stories.title: Stories — Bishvileinu · Memory Builds Life
stories.description: Bishvileinu's living wall of memory — the stories of the fallen and the memorial initiatives founded in their memory. The full archive will be revealed here soon.
stories.og_description: The living wall of memory — the stories of the fallen and the memorial initiatives founded in their memory.
stories.hero_lead: Behind every memorial initiative stands a person, a story and a set of values. Here the stories of the fallen and the initiatives founded in their memory will unfold.
stories.concept_title: From a story — to a path
stories.concept_lead: Every story is a gateway. We gather the stories of the fallen and the living memorial initiatives that grew from them — agriculture, education, settlement, welfare and health — so that communities around the world can get to know them, adopt them and carry them on.
stories.concept_alt: A wall with photographs and stories of fallen soldiers
stories.soon_title: The archive is being built now
stories.soon_lead: We are carefully gathering the stories and the initiatives, together with the families. Soon a full archive will be revealed here — filtered by field — from which every community can choose the initiative closest to its heart.
stories.soon_btn_communities: A community that wants to adopt
stories.cta_title: Every fallen soldier deserves to have their story live on
stories.cta_text: Help us widen the circle of remembrance — join, adopt, or donate.
